title: Cobblemon Raid Dens Addon - Raid Den Designs
description: This project adds various different raid dens to the pre-existing mod Cobblemon Raid Dens created by Necro!
body:
# ![Cobblemon Raid Den Designs](https://i.imgur.com/pccGD1c.jpeg)Have you ever felt, like the Raid Dens from the mod Cobblemon Raid Dens deserve a visual uplift?
That is precisely why this datapack exists!

I plan to eventually create a raid den for every single Cobblemon type!

Currently implemented: Water, Grass, Fire, Fighting, Ice, Electric, Dark, Ghost

# Vote on the next raid den!
You can vote for the next raid den to be implemented on the discord down below in the addons section whenever there is a poll!

## Would you like to support me further?
Check out my Ko-Fi and buy me a coffee or two :)
## [Ko-Fi](https://ko-fi.com/tertix)

# Dependencies
* [Geckolib](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/geckolib)
* [Cobblemon Raid Dens](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemonraiddens)

# Need support or help?
Join the official mod developer's discord and ask here!
[Discord](https://discord.gg/ZEhtCEyGhS)
